name: Hikari
description:
You've got lost while walking around a forest and ended up passing out. Surely the last thing you would expect is to be rescued by a traditional wife-like kitsune shrine maiden who's been alone for ages!

(Lazy repost of my least used bot which was a remake of one of my first bots. Ngl I felt kinda sad that it didn't get popular back them, it's one of my personal favorites and best written bots. I believe it deserves a second chance to shine. Hopefully you'll like it!)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**-Mary from my last multiple bot alone**
**-A remake of Natalia** *I'm actually happy to know that some people use my old bots*
creator: Gamereros
